messages.content: Write a Threshold production plan for: exterior wooden crate, GIMP PBR, physics, rain wetness. texRes 2k, poly low.

PLAN: Exterior wood crate
1. scope — placement:exterior · hero/dressing as needed
2. collision — dynamic mass~12 friction~0.5 · surfaceType:wood
3. mesh — primitives or GLB · poly:low · LOD if large
4. textures — gimp master @ 2k (object name = manifest slot)
5. hilod — textures:watch → _1k/_2k PNG + WebP for Lite/Mobile (no hand 512)
6. weather — wet + dust optional · zoneSheltered if interior
7. atmosphere — Environment time/fog · audioZone:exterior_open
8. shaders — MaterialPresets (no CanvasTexture slop)
9. interact — F hints / collision sfx if needed
10. codegen — pause-guard IIFE · World.createObject(type,name,color,physics)
11. verify — PLAY walk · weather · graphics Ultra + Realistic mode 4
PERF: graphicsTier=Ultra · ollamaQueue=sequential · freeze after big GLB import
NOTES: Name mesh wood_crate for manifest. After codegen PLAY with rain ON.
Production plan: interior lab bench, static, metal surface, sheltered, industrial hum audio, 2k, poly medium.

PLAN: Interior lab bench
1. scope — placement:interior · hero/dressing as needed
2. collision — static locked · surfaceType:metal
3. mesh — primitives or GLB · poly:medium · LOD if large
4. textures — gimp+blender optional master @ 2k (object name = manifest slot)
5. hilod — textures:watch → _1k/_2k PNG + WebP for Lite/Mobile (no hand 512)
6. weather — sheltered (no wet required) · zoneSheltered if interior
7. atmosphere — Environment time/fog · audioZone:interior_warm
8. shaders — MaterialPresets (no CanvasTexture slop)
9. interact — F hints / collision sfx if needed
10. codegen — pause-guard IIFE · World.createObject(type,name,color,physics)
11. verify — PLAY walk · weather · graphics Ultra + Realistic mode 4
PERF: graphicsTier=Ultra · ollamaQueue=sequential · freeze after big GLB import
NOTES: zoneSheltered=true on volume. MaterialPresets pbr_metal_brushed.
Plan for mobile-first deco rocks: poly low, tex 1k masters ok, Lite tier, sequential ollama.

PLAN: Mobile deco rocks
1. scope — placement:exterior · hero/dressing as needed
2. collision — static locked · surfaceType:gravel
3. mesh — primitives or GLB · poly:low · LOD if large
4. textures — gimp master @ 1k (object name = manifest slot)
5. hilod — textures:watch → _1k/_2k PNG + WebP for Lite/Mobile (no hand 512)
6. weather — dust · zoneSheltered if interior
7. atmosphere — Environment time/fog · audioZone:none
8. shaders — MaterialPresets (no CanvasTexture slop)
9. interact — F hints / collision sfx if needed
10. codegen — pause-guard IIFE · World.createObject(type,name,color,physics)
11. verify — PLAY walk · weather · graphics Lite + Realistic mode 4
PERF: graphicsTier=Lite · ollamaQueue=sequential · freeze after big GLB import
NOTES: Prefer few primitives. WebP required for Lite. No heavy GLB batches.
Plan neon night sign: exterior, emissive marquee, wet_hero optional, poly low, 2k.

PLAN: Neon night marquee
1. scope — placement:exterior · hero/dressing as needed
2. collision — static locked · surfaceType:metal
3. mesh — primitives or GLB · poly:low · LOD if large
4. textures — gimp master @ 2k (object name = manifest slot)
5. hilod — textures:watch → _1k/_2k PNG + WebP for Lite/Mobile (no hand 512)
6. weather — wet + weatherMarquee · zoneSheltered if interior
7. atmosphere — Environment time/fog · audioZone:highway_edge
8. shaders — MaterialPresets (no CanvasTexture slop)
9. interact — F hints / collision sfx if needed
10. codegen — pause-guard IIFE · World.createObject(type,name,color,physics)
11. verify — PLAY walk · weather · graphics Mobile + Realistic mode 4
PERF: graphicsTier=Mobile · ollamaQueue=sequential · freeze after big GLB import
NOTES: MaterialPresets pbr_emissive_marquee · shaderHook emissive_pulse.
Plan glass window wall: transitional, wetGlass, glass surface, visual-only collision, 2k.

PLAN: Wet glass window wall
1. scope — placement:transitional · hero/dressing as needed
2. collision — static thin collider or visual-only · surfaceType:glass
3. mesh — primitives or GLB · poly:low · LOD if large
4. textures — gimp master @ 2k (object name = manifest slot)
5. hilod — textures:watch → _1k/_2k PNG + WebP for Lite/Mobile (no hand 512)
6. weather — wet_glass · zoneSheltered if interior
7. atmosphere — Environment time/fog · audioZone:interior_warm
8. shaders — MaterialPresets (no CanvasTexture slop)
9. interact — F hints / collision sfx if needed
10. codegen — pause-guard IIFE · World.createObject(type,name,color,physics)
11. verify — PLAY walk · weather · graphics Ultra + Realistic mode 4
PERF: graphicsTier=Ultra · ollamaQueue=sequential · freeze after big GLB import
NOTES: wetGlass=true · MaterialPresets pbr_glass_wet · ShaderNodeGraph glass_rim.
Plan physics playground: many dynamic spheres — warn about parallel ollama + GLB limits.

PLAN: Physics playground orbs
1. scope — placement:exterior · hero/dressing as needed
2. collision — dynamic spheres + locked floor · surfaceType:metal / concrete floor
3. mesh — primitives or GLB · poly:low · LOD if large
4. textures — procedural MaterialPresets master @ 1k (object name = manifest slot)
5. hilod — textures:watch → _1k/_2k PNG + WebP for Lite/Mobile (no hand 512)
6. weather — none critical · zoneSheltered if interior
7. atmosphere — Environment time/fog · audioZone:none
8. shaders — MaterialPresets (no CanvasTexture slop)
9. interact — F hints / collision sfx if needed
10. codegen — pause-guard IIFE · World.createObject(type,name,color,physics)
11. verify — PLAY walk · weather · graphics Lite + Realistic mode 4
PERF: graphicsTier=Lite · ollamaQueue=sequential (do not parallel with many meshes) · freeze after big GLB import
NOTES: Primitives only — avoid 12+ GLBs. Sequential Ollama queue.
Outline pipeline steps only (numbered) for any hero prop.

PLAN: generic hero prop
1. scope 2. collision 3. mesh 4. textures(2k) 5. hilod+webp 6. weather 7. atmosphere 8. material presets 9. interact 10. codegen IIFE 11. PLAY verify
PERF: sequential ollama · freeze after GLB · Lite test pass before ship
User wants compression only — no new mesh. Plan texture rescale path.

PLAN: texture rescale / compression only
1. scope — existing mesh name must match manifest
2. collision — unchanged
3. mesh — skip
4. textures — keep 2K masters in textures/
5. hilod — npm run textures:hilod (or textures:watch on save) → _1k _2k + WebP
6-9. weather/shaders — keep surfaceType + MaterialPresets
10. codegen — optional TextureBridge.apply only
11. verify — switch graphics Lite/Mobile and confirm maps load
PERF: never replace masters with WebP-only; Lite reads WebP sidecars
Plan multiplayer stage props: host flag + locked floor, medium poly, sequential.

PLAN: MP stage props
1. scope — placement:exterior · hero/dressing as needed
2. collision — static floor locked + light props · surfaceType:concrete
3. mesh — primitives or GLB · poly:medium · LOD if large
4. textures — gimp master @ 2k (object name = manifest slot)
5. hilod — textures:watch → _1k/_2k PNG + WebP for Lite/Mobile (no hand 512)
6. weather — wet · zoneSheltered if interior
7. atmosphere — Environment time/fog · audioZone:exterior_open
8. shaders — MaterialPresets (no CanvasTexture slop)
9. interact — F hints / collision sfx if needed
10. codegen — pause-guard IIFE · World.createObject(type,name,color,physics)
11. verify — PLAY walk · weather · graphics Ultra + Realistic mode 4
PERF: graphicsTier=Ultra · ollamaQueue=sequential · freeze after big GLB import
NOTES: Host-only codegen. Guests get immersive replay.

2. collision — dynamic crates · surfaceType:wood
3. mesh — primitives or GLB · poly:low · LOD if large
4. textures — gimp master @ 2k (object name = manifest slot)
5. hilod — textures:watch → _1k/_2k PNG + WebP for Lite/Mobile (no hand 512)
6. weather — snow + snowCap · zoneSheltered if interior
7. atmosphere — Environment time/fog · audioZone:exterior_open
8. shaders — MaterialPresets (no CanvasTexture slop)
9. interact — F hints / collision sfx if needed
10. codegen — pause-guard IIFE · World.createObject(type,name,color,physics)
11. verify — PLAY walk · weather · graphics Ultra + Realistic mode 4
PERF: graphicsTier=Ultra · ollamaQueue=sequential · freeze after big GLB import
NOTES: MaterialPresets pbr_wood_snow · shaderHook snow_freshen.
Write a Threshold production plan for: exterior metal walkway, wet rain, static, 2k GIMP, poly low, sequential ollama.

PLAN: wet metal walkway
1. scope — placement:exterior · hero walkway
2. collision — static locked · surfaceType:metal
3. mesh — cube scaled slab · poly:low
4. textures — gimp master @ 2k · name metal_walkway
5. hilod — textures:watch → _1k/_2k + WebP
6. weather — wet · shaderGraph wet_hero
7. atmosphere — dusk optional · audioZone exterior_open
8. shaders — MaterialPresets / wet_hero graph
9. interact — none
10. codegen — pause-guard IIFE · createObject cube
11. verify — PLAY rain ON · Lite + mode 4
PERF: graphicsTier=Ultra test Lite · ollamaQueue=sequential
GATES: placement=ok surface=metal weather=wet
ACCEPT: walk on metal footsteps · rain wet look · no clearWorld
Write a Threshold production plan for: exterior wood crate physics, rain wet, 2k, poly low.

PLAN: exterior wood crate
1. scope — exterior dressing prop
2. collision — dynamic mass~12 · surfaceType:wood
3. mesh — cube · poly:low
4. textures — gimp @ 2k · name wood_crate
5. hilod — _1k/_2k + WebP
6. weather — wet
7. atmosphere — exterior_open optional
8. shaders — PBR wood roughness
9. interact — optional
10. codegen — createObject cube physics true
11. verify — push crate · rain · mode 4
PERF: sequential · Lite ok
ACCEPT: physics moves · wood footsteps nearby
Write a Threshold production plan for: transitional glass window, wetGlass, 2k, poly low.

PLAN: wet glass window
1. scope — transitional window pane
2. collision — static thin · surfaceType:glass
3. mesh — thin cube · poly:low
4. textures — gimp @ 2k optional
5. hilod — yes
6. weather — wet_glass
7. atmosphere — interior_warm behind pane
8. shaders — pbr_glass_wet + glass_rim
9. interact — none
10. codegen — transparent material + wetGlass
11. verify — rain wet glass · mode 4
PERF: Lite ok · sequential
ACCEPT: see-through · wetGlass true
Write a Threshold production plan for: mobile-lite courtyard grass pad + one bench, poly low, tex 1k ok, sequential.

PLAN: mobile lite courtyard

2. collision — floor static locked · bench static

7. atmosphere — exterior_open zone
8. shaders — simple PBR
9. interact — none
10. codegen — few meshes only
11. verify — graphics Lite · mode 4
PERF: graphicsTier=Lite · ollamaQueue=sequential · glbMax=0
ACCEPT: <5 meshes · walk pad
Write a Threshold production plan for: interior lab floor + industrial hum, sheltered, metal accents, 2k.

PLAN: lab interior volume
1. scope — interior sheltered
2. collision — floor locked · surfaceType:concrete
3. mesh — floor + optional door · poly:medium

5. hilod — yes
6. weather — sheltered zoneSheltered
7. atmosphere — industrial_hum audioZone
8. shaders — metal accents brushed
9. interact — door optional
10. codegen — pause guard
11. verify — walk interior · no rain wet on floor
PERF: sequential · freeze after any GLB
ACCEPT: zoneSheltered · industrial_hum

Write a Threshold production plan for: exterior plaza props, Lite graphics, Neg LOD far flats, poly low, sequential ollama.

PLAN: lite plaza props
1. scope — exterior dressing · many static cubes
2. collision — locked static · surfaceType:concrete
3. mesh — cube · poly:low · scale variety
4. textures — catalog preset or gimp 1k
5. hilod — prefer 1k on Lite
6. weather — optional light fog
7. atmosphere — GraphicsProfile compatibility
8. shaders — PBR default · Neg LOD auto on Lite
9. interact — none
10. codegen — pause-guard · createObject · locked
11. verify — PLAY · Lite · walk far · flats soft
PERF: graphicsTier=compatibility · NegLOD auto · sequential ollama
ACCEPT: 60fps class on mid PC · far props unlit · no clearWorld
